title: Teltonika TSF010 Flat Ethernet Switch
description: Teltonika TSF010 FLAT ETHERNET SWITCH is an unmanaged Ethernet switch featuring a flat design and integrated DIN rail mounting for plug-and-play deployment in industrial cabinet applications. This Ethernet switch is compact and lightweight , measuring 113 x 28 x 50 mm and weighing only 142 g. Its 3-pin power input and 7-57 VDC voltage range make it a flexible unmanaged switch tailor-made for industrial use. The TSF010 is equipped with five 10/100 Mbps RJ45 ports for reliable connectivity Device 3-pin power connector QSG (Quick Start Guide) Packaging box
